description: Guide utilisateur complet dans la section Aides, structure en premiers pas + guides par section + FAQ, oriente benefices pour le gestionnaire immobilier belge

userStories.title: Route et page de base pour /gestionnaire/aide
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want to access the Aides page from the sidebar so that I can find help about the application
acceptanceCriteria: Page title shows 'Aides' via topbar mapping (already done)
Client component shell with basic layout
userStories.notes: Created page.tsx (Server Component with getServerAuthContext) + aide-client.tsx shell.

userStories.title: Structure de navigation du guide (sidebar desktop + tabs mobile)
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want to navigate between guide sections easily so that I can find help for specific features
acceptanceCriteria: Sidebar navigation with 9 sections (Premiers Pas, Dashboard, Patrimoine, Contacts, Contrats, Interventions, Emails, Parametres, FAQ)
Active section highlighted with primary color
Smooth scroll to section on click
Search input filters visible sections by title/content keywords
Responsive: sidebar hidden on mobile, tabs hidden on desktop
userStories.notes: Sidebar nav (desktop, 56-64w) + horizontal pill tabs (mobile). Active highlight with primary color. Fuzzy search filters sections. ScrollArea for sidebar, smooth scrollIntoView for section navigation.

userStories.title: Contenu Premiers Pas — Quick wins en 10 minutes
userStories.description: As a new gestionnaire, I want a getting started guide so that I can see value within 10 minutes
acceptanceCriteria: 3 cards: Ajoutez votre premier immeuble, Creez vos contacts, Lancez votre premiere intervention
Each card has: Lucide icon, benefit title, 1-2 line description, CTA link to app section
Step-by-step accordion within each card (3-5 steps)
userStories.notes: 3 QuickStartCard components with icon, benefit title, description, expandable steps, and CTA links to /gestionnaire/biens, /contacts, /interventions. Grid 3-col on lg, 2-col on sm, 1-col on mobile.

userStories.title: Guide section Dashboard — Pilotez en temps reel
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want to understand the dashboard so that I can monitor my portfolio at a glance
acceptanceCriteria: Benefit title: Pilotez votre portefeuille en temps reel
Value proposition explaining how dashboard solves '2h/jour searching for info'
KPIs explained (occupancy rate, ongoing interventions, contracts, activity log)
userStories.notes: 4 KPI FeatureCards (occupation, interventions, contracts, activity) + accordion with 3 usage tips.

userStories.title: Guide section Patrimoine — Retrouvez n'importe quel bien
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want to understand property management so that I can organize my portfolio efficiently
acceptanceCriteria: Benefit title: Retrouvez n'importe quel bien en 5 secondes
userStories.notes: 2 FeatureCards (Immeubles/Lots tabs) + 3 accordion items (create building, create lot, occupation tracking).

userStories.title: Guide section Contacts — Fini les contacts perdus
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want to understand contact management so that I can centralize all my contacts
acceptanceCriteria: Benefit title: Fini les contacts perdus dans WhatsApp
userStories.notes: 3 FeatureCards for contact types + 2 accordion items (invitations system, company management).

userStories.title: Guide section Contrats — Plus jamais oublier une echeance
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want to understand contract management so that I never miss a renewal
acceptanceCriteria: Benefit title: Plus jamais oublier une echeance
Automatic status workflow explained (a_venir -> actif -> expire)
userStories.notes: Visual status flow with StatusBadge + ChevronRight. 2 accordion items (create contract, alerts).

userStories.title: Guide section Interventions — Reduisez vos appels de 70%
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want to understand the full intervention workflow so that I can reduce daily calls and manage efficiently
acceptanceCriteria: Benefit title: Reduisez vos appels de 70%
userStories.notes: Most comprehensive section. Visual workflow (5 key statuses). 4 FeatureCards (quotes, scheduling, conversations, documents). 4 accordion items with step-by-step guides. Conversation thread types (group, private provider, private tenant) explained.

userStories.title: Guide section Emails — Vos emails classes automatiquement
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want to understand email integration so that I can link emails to my entities
acceptanceCriteria: Benefit title: Vos emails classes automatiquement
userStories.notes: 4 FeatureCards (entity linking, reply tracking, blacklist, multi-accounts). 2 accordion items (Gmail setup, email linking).

userStories.title: Guide section Parametres — Deleguez sans perdre le controle
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want to understand settings so that I can configure the app to my needs
acceptanceCriteria: Benefit title: Deleguez sans perdre le controle

userStories.title: Section FAQ interactive
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want a searchable FAQ so that I can quickly find answers to common questions
acceptanceCriteria: 5 categories: General, Facturation, Securite, Mobile, Integrations
At least 15 Q&A covering major topics
Search filters FAQ items by keyword match
userStories.notes: 15 FAQ items across 5 categories. Search filters with highlight. Category icons. Empty state for no results. Single-open accordion mode.

userStories.title: Polish et coherence finale (copy + UI review)
userStories.description: Final review pass with copywriter and UI designer agents for tone, clarity, visual hierarchy, and mobile testing
acceptanceCriteria: All text reviewed for tone (vouvoiement, benefit-oriented, specific numbers)
Mobile layout verified (tabs, stacked cards, touch targets >= 44px)
userStories.notes: Applied fixes from both reviews: touch targets 44px, ARIA labels (search, tabs, sidebar), role=tab on mobile, scroll-mt-16, typography scaling (text-xs sm:text-sm), 20 FAQ questions (added: import data, invite team, tenant portal, export data, support SLA), tighter copy (subtitles, CTAs), benefit-oriented CTAs, footer with response time
